'''Mos Espa Open''' was a [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] track on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was a short track that was overlooked by [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]]. First the track would split with two caves. The left one would bring you to an open dune sea. The right one would lead to glass-shaped rock formations that would lead to the end of the first path or you could go through a hole that would go past jabba's palace. Either way, both paths will lead to a narrow path with very tall sand acting as walls. Then it again splits into two small paths which lead to another narrow path leading to the finish line. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] favored this track.

{{Loc-stub}}
